allowed_initial_slice.description: Operational docs, showcase docs, Docker metadata, and formalization ledger stubs only.

payload_rules: Large formalization JSON must be represented in the payload ledger before body promotion.
Docker runtime state and generated service data are excluded.

diagnostic_requirements.hidden_guess_result: required for non-math operations when training mode is enabled
diagnostic_requirements.conservation_receipts: MORSR and conservation claims need receipt binding
